subjectLines: Facebook tip: how the facebook feed works
Practical guide: How the Facebook Feed Works
New Learn guide — how the facebook feed works
previewText: Feed ranking emphasizes meaningful interactions and inventory quality. Page reach varies;…
intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: How the Facebook Feed Works. Feed ranking emphasizes meaningful interactions and inventory quality. Page reach varies; focus on content people interact with rather than outdated “boost every post” folklore.
mainSummary: Feed ranking emphasizes meaningful interactions and inventory quality. Page reach varies; focus on content people interact with rather than outdated “boost every post” folklore.
keyTakeaways: Reach is not a fixed entitlement
